title: On the Death of George, Athanasius returns to Alexandria, and takes Possession of his See.

source.title: NPNF2-02. Socrates and Sozomenus Ecclesiastical Histories

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: Not long after this, Athanasius returning from his exile, was received with great joy by the people of Alexandria.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: They expelled at that time the Arians from the churches, and restored Athanasius to the possession of them.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: The Arians meanwhile assembling themselves in low and obscure buildings, ordained Lucius to supply the place of George.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: Such was the state of things at that time at Alexandria.
